[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 00000000 a
5 00001000 1
6 10110010 4
7 00101000 2

01 10 10000000 1
12 21 00100000 1
23 32 00101000 2 match 7
34 43 00001101 3
45 54 00001000 1 match 5
56 65 10111010 5
67 76 00101010 3
70 07 00001000 1 match 5

02 20 01001000 2
13 31 10110100 4
24 42 00001000 1 match 5
35 53 10111000 4
46 64 00001000 1 match 5
57 75 00101010 3
60 06 10001000 2
71 17 00100010 2

03 30 10001000 2
14 41 00000100 1
25 52 00101000 2 match 7
36 63 10111000 4
47 74 00001000 1 match 5
50 05 10001000 2
61 16 10110010 4 match 6
72 27 00101000 2 match 7

04 40 00001000 1 match 5
15 51 10110010 4 match 6
26 62 00101000 2 match 7
37 73 00101000 2 match 7
